caption: A video presentation features two speakers in split-screen views. On the left, a woman with reddish-blonde hair wears red earrings and a blue patterned blouse. On the right, a man with glasses, a light-colored beard, and a blue shirt sits in a room with a blue wall and a small picture hanging behind him. Across the bottom of the screen, a blue banner displays the word "FOCUS" on the left, followed by the text "with Margaret Harrington." To the right, the banner reads "No More Time" in a larger font, with "Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" underneath. A "TOWN MEETING TV" logo is positioned on the far right. As the sequence progresses, the woman and man both speak, with their facial expressions shifting slightly as they talk. The overall layout and on-screen text remain constant throughout the clip.
